testcase.name: test_04_appointment_0_accepted_participants
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_modification_modes_iter132.py:75: in test_04_appointment_0_accepted_participants assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get participants: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get participants: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
